fileOps.createNewFile: VSCode paste (never use PowerShell here-string for Korean)
fileOps.modifyExisting: PowerShell Get-Content -replace then WriteAllText UTF8 no BOM
fileOps.complexMultilineInsert: Set-Content .cjs file then node execute then delete

rules: Script files MUST use .cjs extension (package.json type=module)
NEVER use node -e with Korean characters (CP949 encoding breaks)
NEVER use PowerShell here-string @' '@ with backtick or dollar sign inside
NEVER use unicode escape \uXXXX for Korean in generated code
ALWAYS include verification step after every regex replacement
ALWAYS run tsc --noEmit before suggesting git push
ALWAYS provide single executable block (no multi-step guessing)
NEVER retry the same failing approach - use different method immediately
PowerShell -replace: escape special chars with [regex]::Escape() for literal match
PowerShell -replace: avoid complex multiline patterns, use .cjs instead
Set-Content Korean text: ALWAYS specify -Encoding UTF8
No hardcoding: use DEFAULT_PROJECT or constants only
Server constants at top of server/server.cjs
knownPitfalls: PowerShell here-string @'...'@ breaks with ( ) inside on some PS versions
node -e with single quotes: Korean chars become CP949 garbage on Windows
.js files fail with require() because package.json type=module
Git add specific file before commit, or use git add -A
Vite HMR may not reflect playbackSlice changes - restart npm run dev
edge-tts --text with Korean fails on Windows - use --file instead
ComfyUI generate endpoint: width/height for Wan22ImageToVideoLatent node
